story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0100_10:
Are you sure you want to reveal your whole
hand to each other during rehearsal?
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0300_10:
This way, we can better understand how
each other battles.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0400_10:
It’ll help us bring out our true selves and
make for a better performance.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0500_10:
I’ve been waiting for this moment, Geeta.
We can finally face each other!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0600_10:
So have I, Diantha. I’ve been wanting
a serious battle against you!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_0700_10: All right. Without further ado... Shall we?
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_1100_10:
I can’t foresee how this battle will end,
even with my psychic powers.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_1200_10:
Amazing, Diantha! You’re even better than
people say!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_1400_10: Oh dear! I think we’re in trouble!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_1500_10: Let’s give it our all, too!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_1900_10: You’ll want to hold off on that, my dear.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2000_10:
Wouldn’t it be better to save that for the
Arceus Cup?
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2100_10: I suppose you have a point.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2200_10:
Then let’s save the deciding moment for the
Arceus Cup.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2300_10: Of course! My apologies. I got carried away!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2500_10:
You may have almost defeated me today,
but on the day of our performance, I won’t
let that happen!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2600_10:
At the Arceus Cup, I’ll give you everything
I’ve got!
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2700_10: Such conviction. I look forward to it.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2800_10:
I too will keep polishing my and Glimmora’s
shine.
story_arceus_10_03000/2401_1001_2900_10:
Although...perhaps I should focus on my
acting first.
